commit.message:
refactor: switch MU-loader from whitelist to blacklist architecture (v6.1.0)

Load all plugins by default, only restrict known-heavy ecosystems
(WooCommerce, LearnPress, bbPress, etc.) when their page conditions
aren't met. Eliminates silent plugin breakage when new plugins are
installed. All restriction rules are now DB-driven via scanner.

fix: improve explanation UI readability and RTL alignment

  instead of manually swapping flex-end/flex-start for RTL

  Namespace, cluster, etc.) so only real commands/tools get code styling
- Add dot to renderBidi regex so DNS names like
  api.prod.svc.cluster.local are captured as single tokens
- Detect DNS/dotted patterns in isCodeTerm for automatic code styling
- Increase explanation paragraph gap from 14px to 18px

commit.message:
Fix coach/parent login, batch assignment, and session validation bugs

COACH LOGIN
- services/api.ts: include phone + sportId in coach login response
  (were silently stripped causing coachUser to have empty phone/sportId)
- middleware/auth.ts: remove duplicate user_data write from storeSession();
  AuthContext is the single source of truth for user_data

PARENT LOGIN
- services/api.ts: include batchName in children[] from parent login response
  (server now returns batchName in student login; pass it through to child object)

SESSION VALIDATION
- middleware/auth.ts: fix validateSession() response check:
  server wraps in { success, data: {...} } — was checking serverData.id
  (always undefined) instead of serverData.data → session never updated

BATCH ASSIGNMENT (assign-batches screen was always showing empty students)
- assign-batches.tsx: useEffect deps changed from [] to [batches.length]
  so loadStudents() only fires after batches are fetched (not on empty mount)
- assign-batches.tsx: replace per-batch loop with single getCoachStudents()
  call → new /mobile/coach/students endpoint returns all students in
  coach's sport including unassigned ones
- services/api.ts + hooks/useApi.ts: add getCoachStudents() / useCoachStudents()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-07-S41: add Parts M,N proof sketches for (10,0) and (8,1)

Part M: Star capacity argument proves (10,0) impossible at n=7.
  At most 9 star cycles through any vertex; 10th non-star cycle forces
  disjoint pairs by combinatorial capacity constraint.

Part N: Cross-cycle forcing argument proves (8,1) impossible.
  Unique disjoint pair creates bridging structure; generalized Five-Cycle
  Forcing creates 9th cycle, pushing alpha_1+2*i_2 >= 11 > 10.

Also corrected i_2 distribution: alpha_1=8 gives {0,3,7} not {0,7}.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(omega-v4): safe keybindings + copy-paste fix + auto-focus Input

Keybindings: single-key q/c/i/t were dangerous — fired when clicking
outside Input (q=quit, c=clear all logs). Changed to Ctrl+Q/L/T/S.

Copy-paste: Fixed status bar "F2 = terug" → "Ctrl+S = terug".
Added Shift+click+drag instructions to help text. Cleaned up
Select Mode toggle with simplified file handle access.

Auto-focus: Input field gets focus on mount so keys always go to
the command line, preventing accidental binding triggers.

Cleanup: moved 'import re' to top-level, removed inline import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix layout selector in visual editor

The layout dropdown in the visual editor wasn't working because the
event handler was trying to access ev.target.value, but ha-select's
'selected' event provides the index in ev.detail.index instead.

Fix: Query the mwc-list-item elements and get the value from the
selected item using the index from ev.detail.index.

* ops: memória semântica, guardrails CI e organização de documentação

## FASE 0 — Quick wins
- fix(sentry): tracesSampleRate 1.0→0.1 em prod (economiza quota); replaysSessionSampleRate 0.1→0.05 em prod
- docs: remove CHECKLIST-ESTADO-DA-ARTE.md (histórico, substituído pelo completo)
- docs: remove checklist-estado-da-arte-minimo.md (todos [x], coberto pelo completo)
- docs: remove docs/checklist-go-live.md (DEPRECATED — aponta para go-live-checklist.md)
- docs: consolida docs/backup-restore.md → docs/backups.md (conteúdo fundido, arquivo removido)

## FASE 1 — Memória semântica (docs/context/)
- feat(docs): cria docs/context/ com 5 arquivos de contexto por domínio
  - code-patterns.md: camadas, TypeScript, React Query, nomes, SOLID/DRY/KISS
  - resilience-patterns.md: double-submit, idempotência, retry, timeout, circuit breaker
  - nfe-input-flow.md: flow 5-step, RPCs, estado React, bugs históricos, armadilhas

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: IdempotencyKeyFilter getServletPath bug + CI matrix for all services (#85)

* fix: use getRequestURI() in IdempotencyKeyFilter and expand CI to all services

getServletPath() returns empty string inside Spring Security filter chain,
breaking exempt path matching. Switch to getRequestURI() minus contextPath
in all 5 services.

Also update CI to test all 5 services via matrix strategy (was S11-only),
and add failOnNoDiscoveredTests + test class excludes for S2/S6 IT/business
test tasks that have no concrete test classes yet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add Instant microsecond comparator to persistence ITs

PostgreSQL TIMESTAMPTZ stores microsecond precision (6 digits) but
Java Instant.now() produces nanosecond precision (9 digits). After a
DB round-trip the last 3 digits are truncated, causing assertion
failures in recursive comparisons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use ignoringFieldsOfTypes(Instant.class) in persistence ITs

PostgreSQL TIMESTAMPTZ stores microsecond precision while Java Instant
has nanosecond precision. withComparatorForType does not override
equals-based comparison for JDK types in Java 17+. Switch to
ignoringFieldsOfTypes(Instant.class) per testing standards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove stale blank lines after ChronoUnit import removal

personal analysis section. Questions like "Väsyttääkö jatkuva asiakkaiden

This completes the fix started in confidenceExplanations.ts.

commit.message:
fix: use exact SUN2000-10K-MAP0 identification layout matching real inverter

Mirror the real Huawei SUN2000-10K-MAP0 inverter register layout exactly:
- Model string: SUN2000-10K-MAP0 at 30000 (15 regs, MAP0 spec)
- Serial number at 30015 (not 30010) per MAP0 spec
- Firmware version at 30035, software version at 30050
- Adds SW version V200R024C00SPC108 at 30050

Real inverter confirmed via Modbus query: unit 3, model SUN2000-10K-MAP0,
SN BT2470706907, FW V200R024D02, ModelID 1004.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Flatten multi-agent architecture into single-layer skills

Remove agent layer (AGENT.md files, agent_loader, delegate tool) and
task/step entities. Move skills from agents/*/skills/ to skills/ and
tools from tools/erin/ + tools/agents/ to flat tools/. Add SkillLoader
to replace AgentLoader. Add http_request tool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GCM encryption: use actual output length instead of buffer size

The getOutputSize() buffer may be larger than actual encrypted output.
Using buffer.length instead of processBytes+doFinal return values
caused extra zero bytes to be sent, corrupting GCM tag verification
on the receiving side (InvalidCipherTextException).

Add form bundles: single link for multiple patient forms

Condenses multiple form links into one URL that opens a branded landing
page with auto-progression. Patient info carries forward between forms
via pre-fill, and each form saves separately to the consents table.

New: form_bundles table migration, lib/form-bundles.js shared utility,
/api/form-bundles/[token] status API, /forms/[token] landing page.
Modified: all 11 consent/intake forms (bundle redirect + pre-fill),
send-forms-sms.js and send-forms-email.js (single bundle link).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: annihilation events now deposit field excitations

Matter-antimatter annihilation energy (rest mass + KE) excites Higgs
and axion fields, same as merge collisions. Also simplified the
field excitation code to share a single deposit path for both event
types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix kiosk v3 in post-update + reboot timeout

Kiosk (issue A):
- post-update.sh had v2 kiosk script hardcoded — every update button press
  was overwriting fix-kiosk.sh fixes with the old windowed version
- Replaced with v3: flock singleton, rm -rf profile, pkill stale Chromium,
  xdpyinfo wait (30s), xrandr resolution detection, --start-fullscreen,
  --window-position=0,0 --window-size=WxH
- Now also restarts kiosk immediately after update (no manual step needed)

Reboot timeout (issue B):
- sudo reboot / poweroff / systemctl restart archimedes killed the server
  before it could send the SSE 'done' event — client waited until timeout
- Added IsDisruptive() detection: sends 'done' event FIRST (800ms before
  executing the command), so browser gets the response while server is alive
